messages.subject: [R-sig-networks] packages for community detection and social network analysis
messages.subject_clean: packages for community detection and social network analysis
messages.body_plain:
SNA, RSiena, latentnet, egonet, tsna.

In general, take advantage of:

http://rseek.org

package search.

Info and examples about social network analysis:

http://www.r-bloggers.com/?s=social+network+analysis


--
GG

http://around-r.blogspot.it




	[[alternative HTML version deleted]]

messages.subject: [R-sig-networks] packages for community detection and social network analysis
messages.subject_clean: packages for community detection and social network analysis
messages.body_plain:
The igraph package has ~10 community detection methods implemented.

See also
http://www.r-pkg.org/search.html?q=community+detection
http://www.r-pkg.org/search.html?q=network+analysis

Gabor

On Fri, Dec 11, 2015 at 8:34 AM, Giorgio Garziano
